reviews.comment:
me quedé con el auto ala madrugada. cuando abrió el bar lleve a mis hijas a desayunar. PÉSIMA ATENCIÓN DEL HOMBRE QUE ATENDÍA..  de muy malas maneras te daba las cosas. horrible experiencia.

(Translated by Google)
I had my car parked there until the early hours of the morning. When the bar opened, I took my daughters for breakfast. The service from the man who was working there was terrible; he was very rude and gave us things. A horrible experience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeXB1Smh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para hacer una parada en la ruta, instalaciones muy limpias y cuidadas. Tiene una placita para distraer a los chicos un rato.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop along the route, very clean and well-maintained facilities. It has a small plaza to keep the kids entertained for a while.
